description: MCP Server Language Converter - Tool Configuration

tools.name: parse_cobol
tools.description: Parse COBOL source code into Abstract Syntax Tree (AST)

tools.name: parse_cobol_raw
tools.description: Parse COBOL source code into raw ParseNode (parse tree)

tools.name: build_ast
tools.description: Build Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) from ParseNode

tools.name: build_cfg
tools.description: Build Control Flow Graph (CFG) from AST

tools.name: build_dfg
tools.description: Build Data Flow Graph (DFG) from AST and CFG

tools.name: build_pdg
tools.description: Build Program Dependency Graph (PDG) from AST, CFG, and DFG

tools.name: batch_analyze_cobol_directory
tools.description: Batch analyze all COBOL files in a directory and subdirectories

tools.name: analyze_program_system
tools.description: Analyze relationships across multiple COBOL programs to build a system graph

tools.name: build_call_graph
tools.description: Build a call graph showing CALL relationships between COBOL programs

tools.name: analyze_copybook_usage
tools.description: Analyze COPYBOOK usage patterns across COBOL programs

tools.name: analyze_data_flow
tools.description: Analyze data flow through program parameters (BY VALUE/REFERENCE)

tools.name: prepare_cobol_for_antlr
tools.description: Prepare COBOL source for ANTLR parser by removing unsupported optional paragraphs (AUTHOR, DATE-WRITTEN, etc.)

tools.name: resolve_copybooks
tools.description: Resolve COPY statements by replacing them with actual copybook content (COBOL preprocessor)

tools.name: batch_resolve_copybooks
tools.description: Batch resolve COPY statements for all COBOL files in a directory, renaming originals to .original
